message:
🐛 Fix cards showing empty state on mode switch instead of cached data (#772)

When switching from demo to live mode, resetToInitialData() was setting
isLoading: false with data: [], causing cards to immediately show "No
deployments found" instead of a loading skeleton or cached data.

Two fixes:
- resetToInitialData() now sets isLoading: true and re-triggers IndexedDB
  load to recover previously cached live data (stale-while-revalidate)
- WorkloadDeployment card now properly reports workloads loading state to
  useCardLoadingState and shows skeleton during initial load

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
